function.name: run_hplc_analysis
function.description: Run an HPLC analysis on a sample. Can fail.

function.name: run_mass_spec_analysis
function.description: Run a mass spectrometry analysis on a sample.

function.name: run_cell_assay
function.description: Run a cell-based assay in the cell culture laboratory. Consumes one biological sample unit. Can fail.

function.name: prepare_formulation
function.description: Prepare a drug formulation in the formulation suite. Can fail.

function.name: verify_regulatory_compliance
function.description: Review clinical data for regulatory compliance. Can result in approval, clinical hold, or rejection.

function.name: review_clinical_data
function.description: Review combined bio/tox results for clinical assessment.
